title: Kielce, Świętokrzyskie — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kielce, Świętokrzyskie: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kielce is a city in Świętokrzyskie with a population of 192,468. The capital of the Świętokrzyskie region, surrounded by the scenic Świętokrzyskie Mountains, known for its trade fairs and natural beauty.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
